old_value: {"id":"smallhold-ms0","title":"Phase 2-B: Inbound follow/unfollow lifecycle","description":"Handle the full Follow/Unfollow lifecycle: inbound Follow with auto-Accept for unlocked accounts, locked account queuing, Undo Follow, and outbound Accept/Reject for follow requests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:27:27Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:27:27Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-85n","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:41Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-efb","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:49Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-gcx","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:40Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-ryy","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:27:36Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
